policy._dwell_notes: min_dwell raised 6->9 on 2026-06-24 (Chris: slides ran a touch quick). dwell_seconds below mirror the per-slide data-dwell in popcorn-foyer.html; the engine clamps each to [min,max].

_notes: Anchors play in defined order across the loop; wildcards bag-refill randomise alongside them. Anchor 'every_n' is the slot interval — rebalanced 2026-06-10 (David) from 6 to 2 so core content (tonight/cast/warnings/tickets) is every OTHER slide, restoring the signed-off deck's ~80% 'tonight' mix; tickets appears twice per anchor cycle (walk-ins are preshow's main sale). The HOUSE-OPEN content-warnings slides are once-per-house-open one-shots, not part of the loop. Slides render live HTML via js/slide-templates.js keyed by the 'template' field below; template keys match the signed-off data-kind values in popcorn-foyer.html.

items._notes: Second tickets slot in the anchor cycle, spaced away from tickets-walkins below. Walk-in sales lead preshow. Now carries the tickets QR (not yet live).
